verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Careless soul, why will you linger, Wand’ring from the fold of God? Hear you not the invitation? Oh, prepare to meet thy God.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Careless soul, oh, heed the warning, For your life will soon be gone; Oh, how sad to face the judgment, Unprepared to meet thy God.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Why so thoughtless are you standing, While the fleeting years go by, And your life is spent in folly? Oh, prepare to meet thy God.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Hear you not the earnest pleadings Of your friends that wish you well? And perhaps before tomorrow You’ll be called to meet your God.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: If you spurn the invitation Till the Spirit shall depart, Then you’ll see your sad condition, Unprepared to meet thy God.
